item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.78,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"周报口径被误读，报表页插定义栏；刷新时间不明，标题区嵌更新时间框；导出列缺义，字段表并入释义格；今天环比数被问，请在图表下放口径字段。"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"管理层十分钟后看；先把图表下的字段放掉。"}],"abstain_reason":"Prior repair history is absent: the conversation lists simultaneous proposed UI clarification patches, not at least three prior same-means local repairs that failed before an N+1 request."}
